name: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
description: Welcome back to the 1980s. From the decade of big hair, excess and pastel suits comes a story of one man's rise to the top of the criminal pile.

name: Minecraft
description: Explore infinite worlds and build everything from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles. Play in creative mode with unlimited resources.

name: Undertale
description: The RPG game where you don't have to destroy anyone. Player choice is paramount as you navigate a world populated by quirky monsters.

name: Deltarune
description: Toby Fox's alternative tale following a brand new set of heroes. Fall into the dark world and fulfill the ancient prophecy.

name: Totally Accurate Battle Simulator
description: Be the leader of red and blue wobblers from ancient lands, spooky places, and fantasy worlds. Watch them fight in simulations made with the wobblest physics ever created.
